messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

Open: visible alert presence conflicts with closure claim; resolution must come from source records, not inference.

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate FAIL indicates artifact missing critical_term X-78 and verdict mapping misalignment. ESCALATE verdict is correct per policy but requires artifact repair to include batch ID and align binding class. Worker must preserve open-boundary finding while repairing gate failures. No model selection permitted per run_lock. Gov repairs gate failures through directive to next worker.

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE required. Source boundary remains open because DEV-XOR-078 alert stays visible for AX-22 Cq<=31. CLOSE-XOR-078 matches batch/assay/criterion/date but does not override visible defect per STD-XOR-078-P. Release cannot proceed until alert resolution is confirmed in source records.
